Our Heritage

A Family Rooted in Ugandan Soil

The Magoye family story begins in Uganda in 1914, when Christopher Kitalimusango Magoye built a life of purpose alongside his wife Deborah Nalumansi.

Together they raised 14 children whose descendants now span generations, united by shared values and the enduring spirit of those who came before.

Read the Story
Christopher & Deborah Magoye, c. 1921

Family Bonds

Matriarch

Deborah Nalumansi

Daughter of Yakobo Kaweesa and Agatha Najjuma, Deborah was the heart of the Magoye household. Her devotion to her 14 children laid the moral foundation this family stands on today.

Patriarch

Christopher K. Magoye

Son of Yokana Magoye and Apolomia, Christopher established the family roots in Uganda in 1914. His legacy of integrity and vision lives in every branch of the family tree.
